name: Rushikesh Sontakke
base_summary: EECS undergraduate at National Tsing Hua University specializing in machine learning and computer vision. Built and deployed end-to-end deep learning pipelines and predictive ML models, with hands-on experience across PyTorch, data engineering, and full-stack deployment.

education.degree: B.S. in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
details: MOE Taiwan Scholarship recipient for academic excellence (merit-based, full funding).
Coursework: Machine Learning, Data Structures, Linear Algebra, Introduction to Quantum Information.

projects.title: Deep Learning Pill Recognition System
bullets: Designed an end-to-end AI pipeline spanning preprocessing, OCR ensembles, feature fusion, and a Flask API, with automated fallback strategies for noisy real-world inputs.
Improved OCR accuracy from 63% to 79.6% across 403 drug classes using CLAHE, Otsu thresholding, and LAB/HSV enhancement.
Fused text, color, and shape features for robust recognition when imprint text was missing or unclear.
Deployed a CPU-only Docker backend on Hugging Face Spaces and integrated it with a React Native mobile application.

projects.title: Student Performance Prediction System
bullets: Built an end-to-end data pipeline over 6,607 records with cleaning, feature engineering, and SQL-like transformations.
Benchmarked regression, random forest, XGBoost, and neural-network models; tuned an ensemble to RMSE 1.80 and R2 0.758.
Applied SHAP analysis to identify behavioral drivers and structure model outputs for decision-making.

projects.title: ChatSphere - Real-time Chatroom
bullets: Built a React and Firebase Firestore application with live message sync, threaded replies, emoji reactions, search, and image uploads.
Implemented email/password and Google authentication plus Firestore and Storage security rules for permissioned access.

experience.title: Teaching Assistant - Introduction to Programming (Python)
bullets: Mentored more than 20 students through labs, debugging sessions, and project guidance.
Supported grading and instruction and organized a course hackathon focused on structured programming and software workflows.

experience.title: Technical Reviewer - ITSA Hackathon
bullets: Evaluated AI and full-stack submissions and built reference solutions to benchmark difficulty.
Produced evaluation reports comparing AI-assisted and traditional development workflows.
